purpose: Source geometry for installed estate navigation anchors and internal location research. The product does not render estate perimeters.
accuracyNotice: A navigation label point is a cartographic anchor, not evidence of legal extent. Estate boundary geometry is not part of the installed product contract.

coordinate-audit-2026-07-18.title: INSIGHT Surrey private-estate display-anchor audit
coordinate-audit-2026-07-18.notes: Coordinates were reconciled from named-place, postcode and estate-map evidence. Each remains candidate until tied to a frozen source record and reviewed on an included road/property or approved polygon.

postcodes-io-2026-07-18.title: Postcodes.io
postcodes-io-2026-07-18.publisher: Ideal Postcodes / Ordnance Survey derived open data
postcodes-io-2026-07-18.notes: A postcode centroid is not a parcel or estate centroid.

givons-official-map.title: Givons Grove map of estate and houses

manygate-council-map.title: Manygate Lane Estate conservation area map

rules: Pins are fixed by geographyVersion and never recomputed from transactions.
A candidate point must not be described as a legal, parcel or estate centroid.
Before approval, freeze coordinate provenance and verify the point on an included road/property or inside an approved display boundary.
Changing an approved point requires a geographyVersion bump and review record.
Held, reclassified and excluded entities cannot receive a live private-estate pin.
DisplayBoundary and classificationGeometry require independent provenance and approval.
Never derive a boundary from a pin, postcode centroid, transaction hull, road-centreline buffer or estate-agent map.
A georeferenced plan records at least four well-distributed control points, transform, residuals, source scale, operator and peer reviewer.
Polygon and MultiPolygon only; validate closed rings, topology, Surrey containment, label-point containment and every edge against the source plan.
Boundary records remain research evidence only and are not rendered or used for classification.

approvalSummary.notes: Every ready/partial-ready estate has a navigation anchor. These anchors are installed for map interaction only; no candidate point implies a legal boundary.
